h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

proof_attempts:
revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      exact (False.elim (Nat.not_lt_zero i h'))
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      have hi : i = 0 ∨ ∃ j, i = j.succ := Nat.eq_zero_or_exists_eq_succ i
      rcases hi with rfl | ⟨j, rfl⟩
      · unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, h', h'']
      · have hj : j < w := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h'
        have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          refine (by
            intro hbits
            have : (args.extract 1)[j] = args[j.succ] := by
              simp [Vector.getElem_extract, hj, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
            have h0 : ¬ (args.extract 1)[j] = 0 := by simpa [this] using h'
            have h1 : ¬ (args.extract 1)[j] = 1 := by simpa [this] using h''
            unfold assert_bits at hbits
            have := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 hbits j hj
            simp [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq, h0, h1] at this)
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        exact ih (w := w) (args := args.extract 1)
          (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) this

debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
U V : A → Type v
hAUBV : ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a)
⊢ U = V

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h : (fun a => U a) = fun a => V a := by
    funext a
    have h' : ((fun _ : U a => PUnit)) = (fun _ : V a => PUnit) := by
      have : ((U a → PUnit)) = (V a → PUnit) := by
        have : ((a : A) → U a → PUnit) = ((a : A) → V a → PUnit) := by
          simpa [forall_const] using congrArg (fun (F : (a : A) → U a) => (fun a => F a → PUnit)) hAUBV
        exact congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a → PUnit) => f a) this
      simpa using this
    have : U a = V a := by
      simpa using congrArg (fun (X : Type v) => (X → PUnit)) (rfl : U a = U a)
    exact Eq.ndrec (motive := fun X => U a = X) rfl (by
      have : (U a → PUnit) = (V a → PUnit) := by
        have : ((a : A) → U a → PUnit) = ((a : A) → V a → PUnit) := by
          simpa [forall_const] using congrArg (fun (F : (a : A) → U a) => (fun a => F a → PUnit)) hAUBV
        exact congrArg (fun (f : (a : A) → U a → PUnit) => f a) this
      have : U a = V a := by
        classical
        exact by
          -- using functional extensionality on constant functions is enough to derive equality of domains via congrArg on `id`-like embedding
          exact by
            -- reduce to `congrArg` on a bijection between types, extracted from equality of function types
            exact by
              cases hAUBV
              rfl) (by rfl)
    )
  simpa using h

debug_info.goal:
case h₂.hpq
L : Logic ℕ
inst✝ : L.IsNormal
m : LO.Modal.Modality
⊢ L ⊢ ∼□atom 0 ➝ ∼∼◇(∼atom 0)

α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have invX : arrow X = iX.inv := by
      rfl
    have invY : arrow Y = iY.inv := by
      rfl
    subst invX
    subst invY
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have leftInvY : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY.hom_inv_id] using hiY.hom_inv_id
    have rightInvX : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX.inv_hom_id] using hiX.inv_hom_id
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ iY.inv)) ≫ (F.homF f) := by
              simp [assoc, nat]
      _ = (D.id (G.F X) ≫ iY.inv) ≫ F.homF f := by
              simp [assoc, rightInvX, leftInvY]
      _ = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
